title: Unidentified Advanced Recon Commando pilot
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image=[[File:ARCpilot.jpg]] |name=Advanced Recon Commando pilot |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]{{CW|21}} **[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] ***[[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]]''[[The Clone Wars Campaign Guide]]'' ****[[The Muunilinst 10|Muunilinst 10]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Approaching droid perimeter. We are undetected.''"
"''Gun it!''"
"''Sir!|ARC pilot and Captain [[Fordo]] approaching the droid perimeter on [[Hypori/Legends|Hypori]]|}} This '''[[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commando]] [[Clone Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]]''' was a part of the [[The Muunilinst 10|Muunilinst 10]] and [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] the Muunilinst 10's [[Muunilinst 10 LAAT|Low Altitude Assault Transport]] during the [[Battle of Hypori/Legends|Mission to Hypori]], where the ARCs were sent to rescue the surviving [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Daakman Barrek]]'s task force. ==Biography== After reaching [[Hypori/Legends|Hypori]], Fordo and his men approached the downed [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] in which the surviving Jedi were hiding, and ordered the pilot to begin jamming the enemy. Making its way past the army of [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]] that surrounded the assault ship, the gunship dropped remote [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]] over the droids, before blasting its way into the ''Acclamator''. After debarking from the LAAT, the Muunilinst-10 were met a wounded [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]] dueling General Grievous. Fordo and his men wasted no time in opening fire on the cyborg general, but Grievous was able to evade their shots. The captain reacted by having his gunship pilot blast his way into the area, and open fire on Grievous with the ship's weapons. While the cyborg fled the site, Fordo's men recovered the other surviving Jedi; [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] and [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]]. When the captain ordered his men back onboard the gunship, Ki-Adi-Mundi protested, insisting that they pursue Grievous, but Fordo pointed out that the survivors would surely perish if they lingered on Hypori. The [[Jedi General/Legends|general]] relented, and boarded the craft. As they flew away from the ''Acclamator'', Fordo activated the remote bombs, wiping out a large number of enemy troops and clearing a path for the gunship to escape. ==Appearances== *{{CW|21}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Advanced Recon Commandos]] [[Category:Clone trooper pilots]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Members of the Muunilinst 10]]
